102 C0500_BIMS_SCRE_NUM C0500_BIMS_SCRE_NUM C0500 Brief Interview for Mental Status (BIMS) Score Number CHAR 2 This column contains the BIMS (Brief Interview for Mental Status) score, which is calculated by adding the scores in items C0200-C0400.
